business.headline: Oil India discovers oil, gas in Libya amid global energy tensionsThe state-owned firm informed stock exchanges that the discovery was made in the Area 95/96 block in Libya, located in the Ghadames Basin in the southwestern region of the country. The area is considered highly prospective for hydrocarbons.

Reddit user asks where to invest Rs 42 lakh. We got experts to answerA Reddit user recently asked a question many retirees quietly worry about, i.e., what to do with Rs 42 lakh after retirement. Should it stay safe in fixed deposits or be moved into mutual funds for better growth? Let's have a look.

India signs FTA with New Zealand: What it means for trade, jobs and investmentAt its core, the agreement focusses on making trade easier and cheaper. One of the biggest highlights is that New Zealand will remove tariffs on all 8,284 product categories. This means Indian goods will get duty-free access right from the start.

More people are stopping SIPs: Should you also consider exiting?More investors are pressing pause on their SIPs as markets turn volatile. Seeing losses can make anyone rethink their strategy, but is stopping really the right move, or could it hurt your long-term plans?

Sensex, Nifty close higher despite oil above $100, IT and pharma lead recoveryThe BSE Sensex closed at 77,303.63, up 639.42 points or 0.83%, while the NSE Nifty 50 settled at 24,092.70, gaining 194.75 points or 0.81%.

Infosys exits top 10 as weak outlook deepens doubts over India IT growthWith its market capitalisation now at around Rs 4.9 lakh crore, Infosys has dropped out of the top 10 list, while LIC has moved in with a valuation of about Rs 5.1 lakh crore.

MobiKwik shares jump 15% today: Why the stock is rallying sharplyMobiKwik shares surged after the RBI approved the group's NBFC licence application. The clearance sharpens its lending push and has raised expectations around the company's next phase of growth.

Bitcoin at 12-week high near $78,000 mark: 3 key factors explainedThe world's largest cryptocurrency is once again on the move, touching a 12-week high near $78,000. The steady nature of this rise is making investors curious, i.e., what exactly is fuelling this momentum?

Crude oil near $110: 7 warning signs India should not ignoreBrent crude has climbed above $107 as markets watch whether tensions and supply risks push oil towards $110. For India, the focus is on how sustained high crude could affect inflation, the rupee, imports and business costs.

India–New Zealand FTA: what's cheaper, what's protected, who benefitsIndia and New Zealand will sign a fast-tracked free trade agreement in New Delhi on April 27. The pact opens duty-free access, work visas, services and investment while shielding sensitive Indian sectors.

Delaying your ITR? Know these key deadlines for filing and correctionsMany taxpayers push their ITR filing to a later date, thinking there's plenty of time. But missing key deadlines can cost more than expected. Here's what you need to know before you delay.

NTPC eyes two nuclear units in Bihar's Banka, may invest Rs 25,000 croreThe company is currently conducting a feasibility study to build two nuclear power units of 700 MW each in Banka district, located around 250 km from Patna. If approved, the project could involve an investment of around Rs 25,000 crore.

Is NPS Swasthya enough for medical emergencies? Here's the realityWith rising healthcare costs, many are turning to NPS Swasthya as a safety net. But is it enough when a real emergency strikes? The answer may not be as reassuring as it sounds.

Sun Pharma's biggest-ever bet: Mega Organon deal, debt risk and global pushSun Pharma just made the biggest bet in Indian pharma history. Markets loved it instantly. Here's why investors backed the Organon deal despite the massive price tag.

Cohance Lifesciences hits 20% upper circuit: Why the stock rising today?Cohance Lifesciences jumped 20% after appointing former Cipla CEO Umang Vohra. Investors are betting his leadership can accelerate growth and transform the company's global ambitions.

Decoding Sun Pharma's $11.75 billion deal: Why the pharma stock jumped 7% today?The stock was trading around Rs 1,739.70 as of 9:46 am, up over 7%, after touching a high of Rs 1,741.85 during the session, reflecting strong investor interest following the announcement.

Paytm shares tumble 6% today: Is this dip a buying chance for investors?Paytm shares fell 6% today. Is this panic-driven weakness, or a smart chance for investors to buy into the fintech stock at lower levels now?

entertainment.headline: Preity Zinta reacts to Rs 18 crore loan controversy, talks about paid PR Preity Zinta addressed rumours about an alleged Rs 18 crore loan and said the reports were "fake news." The actor also revealed why she prefers organic social media engagement over paid PR.

Delhi High Court grants interim order protecting Allu Arjun's personality rights The Delhi High Court has granted interim relief to Allu Arjun and restrained unauthorised use of his name, voice and likeness. The court also directed social media platforms to remove infringing content linked to the actor.

Veteran actor Bharat Kapoor dies at 80 in Mumbai hospital Veteran actor Bharat Kapoor died at 80 in Mumbai after suffering from multiple organ failure. Actor Avtar Gill confirmed the news, adding that his last rites were held on Monday evening.

Preity Zinta reacts to being called Punjab Kings' trophy: Women are not owned Preity Zinta reacted to being called a "trophy" during an interaction on X, saying that women should not be compared to possessions. She also spoke about her upcoming film Lahore 1947 and shared why she chose to sign the project.

Watch: Pedro Pascal fights tears as fans chant his name at The Mandalorian event Actor Pedro Pascal became emotional as fans cheered during the preview of The Mandalorian and Grogu in Mexico. He also shared his personal connection to the Star Wars franchis

Mohanlal's Drishyam 3 teaser release date out; makers unveil new poster Mohanlal announced the teaser release date of Drishyam 3 ahead of the film's theatrical release. The makers also unveiled a new poster featuring Georgekutty, building excitement among fans.

KD song row: Sanjay Dutt apologises to women's panel, to fund education of 50 girls Actor Sanjay Dutt appeared before the National Commission for Women (NCW) over objections to the song Sarke Chunar from KD: The Devil. He also pledged to sponsor the education of 50 tribal girls.

If Wishes Could Kill review: A teen thriller that keeps you on edgeRelease Date:Fri Apr 24, 2026 If Wishes Could Kill follows school students who become entangled with a wish-granting app that comes with deadly consequences. The series stands out for blending digital-age horror with Korean shamanic themes of balance, rituals and consequences.

Kajal Aggarwal, Shreyas Talpade's The India Story release date announced Kajal Aggarwal and Shreyas Talpade's upcoming film The India Story has officially locked its theatrical release. The makers unveiled a new poster and shared that the film is set to release in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu.

Dhanush stops fan from touching his feet at Kara event. Watch viral video A moment from Kara's pre-release event in Coimbatore has gone viral, showing Dhanush gently stopping a fan from touching his feet and choosing to pose with her instead.

Is Sai Pallavi the right Sita? Here's what internet thinks after viral video Sai Pallavi's Hindi remarks at the Ek Din event have triggered fresh debate over her casting as Sita in Ramayana. The reaction has split social media, with many questioning the choice and supporters citing performance over language fluency.

Akashdeep Saigal returns to Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2 with shocking twist Akashdeep Saigal returned to Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2, but not as his original character Ansh Gujral. The actor now plays Ansh's second son Reyansh aka Rio, and his entry leaves Tulsi shocked.

Rekha's Umrao Jaan set for European premiere at UK Asian Film Festival A restored 4K print of Rekha's Umrao Jaan will have its European premiere at the Tongues on Fire UK Asian Film Festival in London. The screening aims to celebrate South Asian stories.

Apex review: Charlize Theron, Taron Egerton anchor an underwritten survival thrillerRelease Date:Fri Apr 24, 2026 Charlize Theron plays a thrill-seeker hunted through an Australian national park in Apex. The film sets up a tense survival duel but rarely finds the writing or menace to deepen it.

Spider-Noir trailer: Nicolas Cage is 1930s private investigator in new Marvel series The official trailer for Spider-Noir, features Nicolas Cage in the lead role. The series will launch globally on May 27, with viewers able to watch it in black and white or full colour.

Exam: Dushara Vijayan, Aditi Balan's series to release in May. Check date Prime Video has announced that its Tamil Original series Exam will premiere on May 15. The seven-episode drama places ambition, injustice, and moral conflict within a high-pressure competitive exam setting.

Michael box office: MJ film earns $217 million globally in 3 days. See India numbers Michael earned $217 million globally in its opening weekend. The biopic of King of Pop, Michael Jackson, broke genre records in India. But was that good enough to set the Indian box office afire? Read on to find out.

Ginny Wedss Sunny 2's Medha Shankr, Avinash Tiwary on unsolicited career advice Medha Shankr and Avinash Tiwary opened up about handling unsolicited career advice in the film industry. The Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 actors shared their perspectives on choosing the right work over outside pressure.

Kantara mimicry row: Court accepts Ranveer Singh's apology, orders temple visit The Karnataka High Court accepted Ranveer Singh's unconditional apology in the Kantara mimicry case after his revised affidavit was filed. The court indicated the matter would be disposed of and asked him to visit the Chamundeshwari temple within four weeks.

general news.headline: Mumbai family feasts on biryani, watermelon, all 4 found dead next morningA late-night meal, sudden illness and a race to save four lives. What unfolded inside a Mumbai home has left more questions than answers, with investigators awaiting crucial postmortem findings.

What next as Kejriwal boycotts judge who refused to withdraw in liquor policy caseAAP chief Arvind Kejriwal has said he has boycotted the Delhi High Court proceedings after Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma rejected his plea to recuse from the liquor policy case. Read more to know what happens next following Kejriwal's decision.

Apologise: TDP supporters storm comedian's show over Chandrababu Naidu jokeThe alleged TDP supporters were referring to a 2024 video that Sarat Uday had uploaded on YouTube, in which he joked about several politicians from Andhra Pradesh. One of his jokes referred to the assassination attempt against Chandrababu Naidu in 2003, while he also joked about his son, who is a minister in Andhra Pradesh Cabinet.

Can't stop oil output, can't export: Iran's dead tanker storing crude on seaIran is running out of room to store its oil produced at Kharg Island. Exports are blocked due to the US's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, forcing it to turn to ageing tankers as a stopgap. With the island nearing its storage capacity, the country is racing against time before its oil storage hits a breaking point.

If you're 45 and paid more, you are first in line for layoffsAs tech companies deepen AI-led restructuring, former employees and recruiters say software models are increasingly shaping who gets laid off. The pattern appears to put older, higher-paid staff and workers farther from direct revenue under greater pressure.
Mumbai-Solapur Vande Bharat derails while entering Pune station; passengers safeThe train originated from Chhatrapati ShivajI Maharaj Terminus in Mumbai and was destined for Solapur in Maharashtra.

Agar badmashi kari... : Encounter specialist on poll duty warns TMC candidateElection observer Ajay Pal Sharma warned Jehangir Khan's relatives after complaints of voter intimidation in Falta. He also sought an explanation after finding more police personnel than those sanctioned for the candidate's security.

Strike her off rolls: UP school principal yells at parents over notebooks, feeA video from Hardoi's Sunbeam School shows principal Mamta Mishra confronting parent Neelam Verma over additional notebooks. The clash has led to a complaint and an official enquiry into pressure on families to buy school supplies.

Melania Trump slams Jimmy Kimmel's 'expectant widow' comment before dinner shootingMelania Trump has accused Jimmy Kimmel of pushing hateful rhetoric after his joke about her sparked backlash. Her attack came as scrutiny sharpened following the shooting that disrupted the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

Dust storm hits Delhi-NCR, brings respite from scorching heatwaveThe first major duststorm of the season swept across most parts of Delhi-NCR, with strong winds likely to continue for 30–45 minutes before easing into light rain, officials said.

Iran Coast Guard fires at tanker with Indian crew; all 17 safe, says governmentIranian forces intercepted the Togo-flagged MT Ceylon near Oman and fired warning shots. India said all crew are safe and has intensified monitoring across the Persian Gulf.

BTS member Jung Kook apologises over technical glitch during Arirang Tampa tourBTS's Jung Kook apologised to ARMY after a brief sound glitch disrupted their Tampa performance of Magic Shop. Fans said the issue was quickly fixed and defended the group against criticism online.

Live: Marco Rubio rejects Iran control of Hormuz, says US won't tolerate restrictionsUS-Iran War Live: Iran's Foreign Minister Syed Abbas Araghchi has reached St Petersburg for high-level discussions with Russian President Vladimir Putin, describing the visit as an opportunity to review ongoing war-related developments and regional tensions. He indicated that earlier engagements in Islamabad were constructive, with both sides examining conditions required for resuming dialogue between Iran and the US. Amid these diplomatic efforts, global energy markets have reacted, with Brent crude prices climbing over two percent as uncertainty persists around negotiations. On the ground, tensions remain elevated, with the US military maintaining pressure through a maritime blockade targeting Iranian ports, forcing dozens of vessels to change course. The wider region continues to see instability spill over, as Israeli forces carried out strikes near the entrance of Kafra, severing access routes and adding to concerns of further escalation. Catch all the live updates at indiatoday.in.

Mysterious call drop as reporter recounts warning by Karoline Leavitt's husbandAn abrupt end to a Fox News live report by correspondent Aishah Hasnie has sparked questions. The live feed ended as Hasnie was recounting a warning from White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt's husband, Nicholas Riccio, just ahead of the firing that disrupted the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

Mamata faces intense BJP fight on her Bhabanipur turf. What does that reveal?The BJP has transformed Mamata Banerjee's safest constituency into West Bengal's most-watched contest in the 2026 West Bengal Assembly election. With Suvendu Adhikari as the challenger, caste surveys and door-to-door campaign, the Trinamool Congress chief faces the most serious test on her turf yet.

Man dies after fall from moving train, passengers allege emergency chain failureA Jharkhand man died after falling from the moving Brahmaputra Mail near Raninagar in Jalpaiguri. Co-passenger claims over a failed chain pull and delayed response have drawn scrutiny.

You're a disgrace: Trump berates journalist for quoting gala dinner shooter's noteDonald Trump clashed with CBS News journalist Norah O'Donnell after she read from White House event shooter Cole Allen's manifesto on air, which referred to a "pedophile, rapist, and traitor".
What does it take to land on the Met Gala's guest list?The Met Gala is one of the most coveted nights of fashion, and you can't just buy your way onto the red carpet.

Fossil unearthed by rains in Tamil Nadu turns out to be ancient relicScientists involved in the study say the fossils could provide valuable insights into the type of species that once inhabited the region, as well as the environmental conditions that prevailed during the late Holocene.

US humiliated by Iran: German Chancellor's reality-check on warFriedrich Merz questioned the United States' exit strategy in the Iran war and warned about risks in the Strait of Hormuz. His remarks highlighted European concern over Tehran's strength, energy disruption and economic fallout.

India's summer arrives early, and a Super El Nino is brewingHeat waves have hit 11 states. Banda, in UP, touched 47.4°C. And forecasters say a possible Super El Nino could stretch the heat through 2026.

Uno reverse on Rinku: Mohsin gets KKR star's bat after Lucknow heroics After Kolkata Knight Riders' super over win over Lucknow Super Giants, Mohsin Khan asked Rinku Singh for one of his bats. Following some help from Rishabh Pant, the LSG pacer was able to find success.

Thomas Cup: India storm into quarterfinal after hammering Australia 5-0Thomas Cup 2026: 2022 champions India beat Australia 5-0 in Horsens to book their Thomas Cup quarter-final place. The result kept them atop Group A and set up a table-deciding clash against China.

I take Rs. 100 per photo: Sooryavanshi pranks young RR fans in viral videoRajasthan Royals opener Vaibhav Sooryavanshi pranked two young fans at an airport by claiming he charged Rs 100 for a photograph. Relieve Pant of captaincy, make Markram LSG skipper: Ex-India openerWasim Jaffer has urged Lucknow Super Giants to replace Rishabh Pant with Aiden Markram as captain after the loss to Kolkata Knight Riders. 25 doping tests in 2 months: How the fastest-ever marathoner conquered time and doubtThrough injury setbacks and rigorous, self-funded anti-doping checks, Kenya's Sabastian Sawe delivered a historic 1:59:30 at the London Marathon, becoming the first athlete to break the two-hour barrier in a sanctioned race.

Rohit amps up training, set for return in MI vs SRH clash after injury layoffRohit Sharma has intensified training and is likely to be available for the Mumbai Indians against the Sunrisers Hyderabad. Dig at CSK? Shubman Gill poses with whistle in Chennai, sparks mixed fan reactionsIPL 2026, CSk vs GT: Shubman Gill's Instagram post with a CSK yellow whistle triggered a sharp reaction after Gujarat Titans beat Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. The light-hearted outing came ahead of a rematch that could shape RCB's title defence.

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.
